name: NEXTDC Limited
description: NEXTDC Limited is a leading Australian technology company and data centre provider that specializes in delivering mission-critical colocation services and interconnected infrastructure. The company operates a nationwide network of Tier IV-certified data centres, providing secure, scalable, and high-performance environments for cloud providers, enterprises, and government organizations. With a strong focus on sustainability and innovation, NEXTDC enables digital transformation through its advanced connectivity platforms, such as AXON, and its commitment to building AI-ready infrastructure. Headquartered in Australia, the company continues to expand its footprint internationally to support the growing demand for reliable digital infrastructure across the Asia-Pacific region.
